title: run_requested carries the supervisor identity + a faithful Commission snapshot
description: The opening run_requested event records who requested the run (avp.supervisor.name, from Commission.supervisor.name) and a full snapshot of the Commission under avp.commission. This is what makes a trajectory self-contained: an auditor can re-derive the Commission that started the run from the wire alone. Structural and model-agnostic, so it holds for any conforming agent.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
